theme.description: A developer-oriented editorial site. High-contrast prints meet dark IDE terminals. Bold asymmetry, kinetic typography, and raw functionality.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-light tracking-tighter leading-none
hierarchy.eyebrow: text-xs md:text-sm font-mono tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-primary

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetric Bento (Mode A). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 with 3-column offsets for tension.
spacing_and_layout.container: Max width 1440px, massive horizontal padding (px-6 md:px-12) to avoid edges.

components.cards: Sharp edges (0px) or max 4px radius. 1px solid borders. No soft shadows. In dark mode, pure 1px #2A2A2A borders.
components.buttons: Square edges, high contrast. Primary: solid color (Red) or Inverse (Black/White). Secondary: Outline with monospace text.
components.code_blocks: Syntax highlighting via Prism/Shiki using JetBrains Mono. Styled as raw terminal windows with brutalist mono headers. Dark background in both themes for contrast.
components.navigation: Sticky, crystal glassmorphism blur (backdrop-blur-xl) with a sharp 1px bottom border. Include theme toggle here.

motion.hero: Staggered word reveal for H1. Subtle floating animations for background imagery.
motion.scroll: Smooth scrolling via Lenis. Fade-up + slight Y-translate for sections on intersect.
motion.interactions: Hover states on bento cards shift border color to primary and slight -translate-y-1.

image_urls.description: Wide-angle abstract 3D render of a glowing temporal knowledge graph. Use with max 40% opacity overlay.
Abstract architectural 3D visualization of memory layers.
Close-up macro shot of a complex timeline evolving, overlapping translucent data chains.

sections_direction.hero: Left-aligned massive Cormorant Garamond typography. 'amnesiac' must be italicized for editorial feel. Background features hero_graph_abstract with gradient overlay. CTA button + Quick Start link.
sections_direction.problem: 3-column asymmetric layout comparing failure modes (Chat history, Vector stores, RAG). Monospaced eyebrows over large serif problem statements.
sections_direction.how_it_works: Vertical scrolling steps (01, 02, 03) in massive monospace numerals. Left side sticks, right side scrolls featuring dynamic code blocks and graph visualizations.
sections_direction.architecture: Full-width section with memory_layer_viz image. 5 layers listed clearly using grid system. Deep background contrast.
sections_direction.differentiators: Bento Grid (Tetris Mode A). Staggered sizes. E.g., 3-Lane Retrieval gets col-span-8, MCP-Native gets col-span-4. Monospace labels with sharp borders.
sections_direction.quick_start: Brutalist terminal UI for the MCP config JSON snippet. 'Up in minutes.' in large serif H2.
sections_direction.footer: Massive typography 'Give your agent a lifetime', 1px top border, minimalist layout, right-aligned nav links.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure full light/dark mode support using Tailwind 'dark:' variants. Use 'Cormorant Garamond' for headings, 'JetBrains Mono' for eyebrows/code/ordinals, and 'Satoshi' for body text. Enforce strict 1px solid borders for containers. No rounded corners above 4px. Use lucide-react icons. Add data-testid to all interactive elements. Install required fonts from Google Fonts.
